title: Sanza

(Krish) |region=[[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]]{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} |sector=[[Sloo sector/Legends|Sloo sector]] |system=[[Sanza system/Legends|Sanza system]] |coordinates=P-14{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} |xyz= |distance= |suns= |orbited= |position=P-14 |moons= |routes= |lengthday= |lengthyear= |class=Terrestrial |diameter= |atmosphere= |climate= |gravity= |terrain=*[[City/Legends|Urban]] *Rainforests |water= |interest= |flora= |fauna= |otherlife= |species=[[Krish (species)/Legends|Krish]] |otherspecies= |socialgroup= |language=[[Krish (language)|Krish]] |government= |population=10 million to 100 million (c. [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]])''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |demonym= |cities= |imports= |exports= |affiliation= }} '''Sanza''', also known as '''Krish''', was a [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] dedicated to casinos, race tracks, arenas, agriculture, and manufacturing. It was the home of the [[Krish (species)/Legends|Krish]] species. {{Planet-stub}} ==Appearances== *{{HoloNetNewsWeb|55|sports/1359_1.html|Jedi Defeated for Teräs Käsi Title}} {{Mo}} {{C|as "Krish"}} ==Sources== {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images of Sanza}} *''[[Alien Encounters]]'' {{C|as "Sanza"}} *[[The Essential Guide to Alien Species (real-world book)|''The Essential Guide to Alien Species'']] {{C|as "Krish"}} *''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' {{C|as "Sanza"}} *{{FactFile|88|LEI 1-4|Leisure}} {{C|as "Sanza"}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' *{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Sanza |es=Krish }} [[Category:Planets in the Mid Rim]] [[Category:Planets in the Slice]] [[Category:Sloo sector locations]]
